props.Description: Fix and leave hangar.

props.Blocks: Batteries (x1), Large Cargo, O2/H2 Generator, Gravity Generator, Assembler, Refinery, Beacon

props.Description: Fix the cargo-to-refinery conveyors. Fix the refinery, and build an assembler.
Fix the sliding door, the air vent, window, and top armor block by the winder. Load the H2/O2 Generator with Ice.

props.Blocks: Batteries (x1), Large Cargo, O2/H2 Generator, Gravity Generator, Assembler, Refinery, Beacon

props.Description: Fix the parts on the H2/Ice-Mining Ship. Collect ice.
Repair remote control and add antenna to remotely navigate a drone. Use Shift+K for quick remote control access. Also, add the camera to the Drone's tool bar for easier navigtation.
props.Shenanigans: Remove the tail, and make a flat area to attach a helm -- now you have a Space Segway ;)

props.Blocks: Modified starter ship, with jump drive
Modified starter ship, with jump drive
Small Cargo, Oxygen Generator, H2/O2 Generator, H2 Engine, Connector

props.Note: Random Spawn location based on player position

props.SourceMaterials: Timer Block and a thruster on Drop Ship.

props.Note: IS NOT dependent on Remote Control Block!

props.Description: When you land with a drop ship: dig a hole that the ship CAREFULLY falls into. Getting the survival kit below rock line allows stone to fall towards the survival kit for faster collection/continual gravel production.

Focus on building a base that will vertically mount a drill. Use small grid head to build up to large grid. Pistons to move further down (7 wide sweep), then when deep enough move to horizontal Hing drilling (move conveyors like rails)

Focus on building a base that will vertically mount piston drills on a rotor. drill. Use small grid head to build up to large grid. Pistons to move further down (7 wide rotation), then when deep enough move to horizontal rotor drilling (move conveyors like rails)

nodes.label: Produce Gravel in Survival Kit (From Stone)

props.keymqdu7i0c: This generates basic ingots (Fe, Ni, Si)

nodes.label: Build Wind Turbine and Basic Assembler Components in Survival Kit

props.Note: Click MMB to swap "weapon mode"; no KNOWN method on Controller
Hold SHIFT, the press P, while looking at target block.

props.Description: With the provided frame: (1) add cockpit, (2) six-directions of thrusters, (3) a gyroscope, and (4) power (reactors or batteries)
Turn on projector, built a scaffold to allow the welders to weld (upstairs button), and detach from the merge block to fly ship away.
This is a standalone task-button and warning beacon that is 5Km from the Pirate Station.
Attack and takeover a Pirate Space Station.
props.Defenses: Defense Drone (two gatling guns + Missile Turret; small grid). The Station has two main, large grid, Gatling turrets on the top and bottom of the 'front' of the ship.

nodes.label: Task 15 - Destroy Two Station Gatling Turrets
Task 16 - Repair and Configure Ship for Jump

props.Description: This Large Grid Ship is abandoned and contains a Jump Drive to use to travel to Base 12.

nodes.label: Task 17 - Jump Drive to Hidden Base

props.Description: When the player uses the "Mayday" ship to Jump to the hidden base, then they must travel within 1Km to complete the task.
props.Game Achievement: Complete all tasks in this starting area.

props.Description: The Pirate is a multi-compound, multi-defenses location. Players must fight through the defenses in order to remove the Pirate threat.
props.Game Achievement: Destroy the base without entering the Planet's Gravity

props.Description: Upon beating the 'main area' (Achievement is 'Engineering Degree'), the player can opt-in and continue on to Earth.

props.Name: Engineering Degree
props.Description: Finish all tasks of the Learning to Survive Scenario. The tasks are marked with beacons.

props.Name: Promoted Engineer
props.Description: Complete the final objective of the Learning to Survive Scenario (Defeat the Pirate Capital Ship).

props.Name: Planetesphobia
props.Description: Disable the Pirate's Planet-based base without entering the atmosphere.

props.Name: It Takes But One
props.Description: Complete all scenario objectives without dying.
